seoTitle: Diamond Creek vs Digby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Diamond Creek and Digby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Diamond Creek vs Digby: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamond Creek and Digby.
heading: Diamond Creek vs Digby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamond Creek, Victoria and Digby, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Digby has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Diamond Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamond Creek or Digby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamond Creek has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Digby scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamond Creek scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Digby scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamond Creek or Digby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Digby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
